description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house situated centrally on a large, rectangular lot surrounded by dense trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The house features clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white and gray exterior, with large windows that allow for ample natural light. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is set back from the street and partially obscured by the tree line. The property includes a backyard area with a visible swimming pool and a small outbuilding or garage. The landscaping is minimalistic, with the trees forming a natural perimeter and the rest of the lot kept open. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a spacious, open-plan layout.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a backyard pool and a driveway leading to the main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and dense tree coverage along the street-facing side.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the backyard pool, open lot, and the small outbuilding near the rear corner.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the back of the property and the outbuilding.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the length of the house, the tree perimeter, and the driveway connecting to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, no porch, and a straight driveway approach, partially screened by trees.
